&demo_disclamer: <color=#FFDD00>Warning:</color> This is a demo, thus it may not fully represent the final game's quality, content, or performance.
&demo_over:
Thank you for playing the demo of Ternion!

If you want to experience the full adventure, purchase the game and continue your journey!
&tut0_0:
Ternion's combat system is turn-based:
Every character has his own turn during battle. You can choose between many options.
&tut0_1:
The HUD is very simple.
For each character there are three bars. The white bar represents the character's HP (health points), the blue one represents the stamina (to use techniques) while the cyan bar represents the current BioTech energy (to use... BioTech).
&tut0_2:
The options you can choose are quick attack, protect yourself, techniques, offensive/protective BioTech, items and change weapon.

With quick attack you will attack the enemy you're aiming.
To change the target you can use the right stick or the right/left arrow keys .
&tut0_3:
If you protect yourself you will receive less damage until that character's next turn. You can use it when a lot of enemies are aiming that character.

You might understimate this option, but remember it could save you from a Game Over.
&tut0_4:
The techniques are abilities you automatically unlock when you advance to a certain level. To use them you need to spend stamina energy.
The stamina energy is a value that starts from zero and slowly increases when a character is not doing any action.
If the character looses his HP, stamina will return to zero.
Usually tecniques that requires more stamina are also more powerful.
&tut0_5:
The BioTechs are advanced biotic abilities that can be executed using your HDev.
These can be unlocked from your HDev paying the price of their licence.

Some character could be better than others at using them.
To use these abilities you need HDev energy, this value will also increase with time but it requires a lot of time.
&tut0_6:
There are many items you can use during battle.
These items can usually give you HP/stamina/HDev energy or remove some altered states.

Be careful! There are some items you don't know the effects until you try them, could be very good or very bad!
&tut0_7:
Weapons can be changed during battle.

If you want to change approach to an enemy you can switch weapon, it will consume the current action but remember that with a gun you can reach enemies you couldn't reach with a sword.
&tut0_8:
If you're in hurry you can choose to Flee. You'll lose all of your current turns, and instead, a new 'escape' turn will appear. If, during that turn, every character has an escape route, the attempt will be successful. Otherwise, you'll just lose valuable turns. If you're in danger and have an escape route, consider this option.

Remember: You won't receive any exp. even if you defeated some of the enemies.
&tut0_9:
To end the battle you need to defeat every enemy on the screen. If the whole characters of your team reaches 0 HP you'll get a ''Game Over'' and you'll need to reload the last savegame.

Good luck!
&tut1_0: When you don't know where to go you can open the <color=%userlightcolor%>pause menu</color> and select the <color=%userlightcolor%>map</color> tab, if enabled, to check where you need to go.
&tut2_0:
In some battles, especially during random encounters, you can choose to flee. You'll lose all of your current turns, and instead, a new 'escape' turn will appear. If, during that turn, every character has an escape route, the attempt will be successful. Otherwise, you'll just lose valuable turns. If you're in danger and have an escape route, consider this option. In this battle, for example, it's virtually impossible to come out victorious.

Remember: You won't receive any exp. even if you defeated some of the enemies.
&tut3_0: Currently you are stuck to the Ternion, but you can still move if you really wish.
&tut3_1: While you're not in the interstellar space you can shoot a target with missiles (%glyph:fire%). Now keep attacking the deflector shields of the Ternion before yours get destroyed!
&tut5_0: Use the directional arrows to change your direction, use the %glyph:enter% button/up arrow to jump forward.  If you press the %glyph:hdev% button you can reset the progress, just in case...
&tut6_0:
The Focus skill will make your character focus for the next three turns. While the character is focused he will be able to dodge and counterattack the next physical attack he will receive, and receive less damage by other type of attacks.

If the counterattack gets inflicted or if any other action, except protect yourself and move, is executed then the focused status is lost.
&tut7_0:
This is your spaceship, and you’ll use it to travel to a new planetary system.

Right now, you can’t afford to waste time, so you’ll be limited to a single destination in your mission to defeat Desert.

To accelerate your spaceship use the %glyph:accelerate% button, to slow down use the %glyph:brake% button, once you reach your desired velocity, further acceleration is no longer needed to maintain it. To roll left or right you can use %glyph:rollleft% and %glyph:rollright% buttons. Movement commands now control pitch and yaw, while view commands can still be used to look around and help you pass the time. The destination is directly marked on the screen. Fly safe!
&tut8_0:
In the Imperial Town of Atanaki, people travel using hovercrafts. They are free to use by anyone and provide a more comfortable way of moving compared to swimming.

To accelerate an hovercraft, press the %glyph:accelerate% button, and to slow down, press the %glyph:brake% button. When you reach another docking point, you can interact with it to dock the hovercraft and disembark. It is recommended not to bump into the boats floating in the city, as they might drift away and their owners may not find them anymore, but sometimes it just happens.
&tut9_0:
Some characters have an HDev, a wearable computer required for leveling up. You can access the HDev by pressing the %glyph:hdev% button or through the main menu.

Characters without an HDev will level up automatically. For more detailed information on each feature, you can talk to Fushiko or check the ''Help'' section in the HDev.
&tut10_0_PC: This challenge looks pretty demanding! Use the left or right %glyph:accelerate% and %glyph:brake% keys to move your left or right hand on the raft, respectively. Try to reach the end of the course before the others!
&tut10_0_joystick: This challenge looks pretty demanding! Use the two analog sticks to control each hand’s movement and try to reach the end of the course before the others!
&tut11_0_PC: Press the %glyph:aeroboard% button to mount your Aeroboard. Use the directional keys to steer and to accelerate/brake. Be careful: if you hit something at high speed, you may fall off your vehicle!
&tut11_0_joystick: Press the %glyph:aeroboard% button to mount your Aeroboard. Use the left stick to steer, and %glyph:accelerate% and %glyph:brake% to accelerate and brake, respectively. Be careful: if you hit something at high speed, you may fall off your vehicle!
&hdev_help_0: The HDev is your wearable computer, you can open it with the %glyph:hdev% button. There is a completely different HDev for every member of the party who owns one, except for <color=%userlightcolor%>Inventory</color> which is shared between the users. The functions are <color=%userlightcolor%>Enforcement</color>, <color=%userlightcolor%>Biotech</color>, <color=%userlightcolor%>Techniques</color>, <color=%userlightcolor%>Loadout</color>, <color=%userlightcolor%>Inventory</color>, <color=%userlightcolor%>Outfit</color> and <color=%userlightcolor%>Terminate</color>, which turns off the HDev.
&hdev_help_1: The <color=%userlightcolor%>Enforcement</color> function lets you increase the stats of your characters (as physical strength, etc.) given a requested amount of <color=%userlightcolor%>exp</color>. Remember to use this function very often. If you own some special ''food supplement'' items you can use them arbitrarily while progressing from a level to another, to additionally increase a specific stat.
&hdev_help_2: The <color=%userlightcolor%>Biotech</color> function lets you buy the licence for Biotech abilities. There are two types of Biotech abilities: Protective BioTech and Offensive BioTech. Whenever you buy the licence of a given skill you will be able to use it in combat. Some Biotech abilities (mostly Protective ones) can be used directly on this same menu to cure your allies while not battling.
&hdev_help_3: The <color=%userlightcolor%>Techniques</color> function lets you check which Techniques the HDev user can perform. Some of these will tell you at which level they have been unlocked or at which level they will unlock.
&hdev_help_4: The <color=%userlightcolor%>Loadout</color> function allows you to view the list of weapons in your possession, along with their descriptions and key details, and enables you to switch your equipped weapon with another one.
&hdev_help_5: The <color=%userlightcolor%>Inventory</color> function lets you check your shared inventory for items you've obtained. You will be able to use some of these items directly in the menu, mosly to cure allies while not battling.
&hdev_help_6: Last but not least: <color=%userlightcolor%>Outfit</color>. Here you can change completely the look of your character selecting between some preset outfits, which will be also shown in most of the cutscenes. In the beginning of the game you start with no outfits, but you'll be able to buy/find some during the course of events. Eventually you can sell them in the clothes shops if you're really short on credits!
&out_Senso_0_d: The standard DTA uniform used by soldiers from Level 3 to Level 7 and part of the stuff. Designed to be both agile and protective.
&out_Senso_1_d: PowerLift tight pants are perfect for any kind of sport. Worn with a standard black sleeveless shirt.
&out_Senso_2_d: The most desired outfit of the galaxy, just for the winners of the Great Hunt.
&out_Senso_3_d: The DTA uniform with Snow Camo. The designers added some black elements, which made the camouflage's effectiveness questionable. However, its ability to maintain a constant temperature is extraordinary.
&out_Fushiko_0_d: The standard DTA uniform used by soldiers from Level 3 to Level 7 and part of the stuff. Designed to be both agile and protective.
&out_Fushiko_1_d: A simple black shirt combined with a simple black skirt, elegant and comfortable.
&out_Fushiko_2_d: The famous outfit from an equally famous woman. The best quality you can have on the market, for a classic pair of bloomers worn with a pink sleeveless shirt.
&out_Fushiko_3_d: The DTA uniform with Snow Camo. The designers added some black elements, which made the camouflage's effectiveness questionable. However, its ability to maintain a constant temperature is extraordinary.
&out_Yuki_0_d: The standard DTA uniform used by soldiers from Level 3 to Level 7 and part of the stuff. Designed to be both agile and protective.
&out_Yuki_1_d: Get ready to A-Maze every single girl of the galaxy with this brand new outfit. JK AMOLED Jeans with a luminous orange stripe are an amazing cherry on the cake.
&out_Yuki_2_d: This DTA uniform guarantees an incredible resistance to any kind of damage. If combined with a suit and a helmet the soldier becomes virtually invulnerable.
&out_Yuki_3_d: The pressurized DTA uniform is capable of withstanding atmospheric pressures between 0.07 and 36 times standard atmospheric pressure. It is not designed to endure a total absence of atmosphere, unless paired with a full space-walk helmet.
&out_Lucy_0_d: The standard DTA uniform used by soldiers from Level 3 to Level 7 and part of the stuff. Designed to be both agile and protective.
&out_Lucy_1_d: Sporty green tracksuit worn with a colorful tube shirt. A great compromise between aesthetics and performance.
&out_Lucy_2_d: A cute Black & White high contrast dress with the printed ReZe logo on the front. You can eventually wear a pair of leggings for the colder environments.
&out_Lucy_4_d: The DTA uniform with Snow Camo. The designers added some black elements, which made the camouflage's effectiveness questionable. However, its ability to maintain a constant temperature is extraordinary.
&wdesc_Blasters: The blasters are the weapons used by Rachet's soldiers to fight the incincible Noras army. They are confortable, very fast, and uses energy, so the don't need ammo, but they cause low damage and the can go overcharge.
&wdesc_DTASword3: This sword is crafted using the latest forging techniques, giving it the perfect balance of durability and flexibility. Its curved shape makes it ideal for slashing but less suited for thrusting. Nevertheless, it is regarded as a highly versatile weapon.
&wdesc_DTASword10: This sword is the most powerful melee weapon ever produced in the DTA ballistic labs. It can pierce even our own armor and the toughest materials. Due to its extremely high production cost, it is issued exclusively to elite soldiers.
&wdesc_Betrayal: This sword has known to be the most confortable and cheap in the market, it's so perfectly balanced you will never miss your target. Compared to similar weapons it is very light, as consequence might deal less damage.
&wdesc_GamonSword: The sword usually used by Gamon, personally modified to resemble a large cleaver. It is relatively light for its size but still heavier than any other type of melee weapon. A lot of practice is needed to use it effectively.
&wdesc_Catastrophe: A longsword perfect in its balance and suitable for use with two hands. Very effective for both slashing and thrusting.
&wdesc_StormsBlade: Not much is known about the history of this sword, except that its previous owner was Desert, as it was gifted by him in person. With its center of mass positioned forward, it is complicated to master and much more suited for slashing than thrusting. However, it is extremely light, though this does not diminish its potential in any way.
&wdesc_LucysSword: A sword purchased by Lucy to keep herself in training, forged by an experienced DTA blacksmith residing on the planet Atanaki. It was first sharpened after the kidnapping of Hil.
&wdesc_RebelSword: A sword usually used by rebels, rumored to have been mass-produced by a dissident named Mihalthai through foundries located on the planet Nelhan. Its extremely low production costs make it a relatively inexpensive melee weapon, but also quite effective.
&wdesc_Shotgun: A sawed-off shotgun capable of causing significant damage at the cost of a very low rate of fire and unfortunately a relatively short range compared to other firearms.
&wdesc_SMG1: An automatic submachine gun with an extremely high rate of fire. The damage caused by a single bullet is relatively low, but due to the enormous number of bullets fired in a unit of time, it is one of the most lethal weapons available. Yuki owned a model that, unfortunately, had experienced malfunctions.
&wdesc_PlasmaCannon: A technologically advanced firearm capable of hitting even the smallest targets with very high precision. However, the rate of fire is extremely low, requiring the user to employ it with precise timing.
&wdesc_Slugthrower: A firearm capable of repeatedly firing explosive projectiles that cause significant damage even to armor. It is an extremely dangerous weapon that must be used with great caution.
&wdesc_AssaultRifle1: An assault rifle from the K7 family, developed during Rachet's rebellion. Compared to its predecessors, it boasts an almost endless magazine and very high accuracy in single-shot mode, while it is significantly reduced in full auto mode.
&wdesc_Byarga: A roller pistol that mysteriously appeared on the market. The origin of this weapon is unclear, but it is believed to be capable of causing significant damage. However, there are far more effective alternatives.
&idesc_potion: Returns half of the target's HP.
&idesc_hi_potion: Returns whole of the target's HP.
&idesc_potion_pack: Returns half of the party's HP.
&idesc_hi_potion_pack: Returns whole of the party's HP.
&idesc_revitalizer: Helps someone in crytical state returing half of the target's HP.
&idesc_hi_revitalizer: Helps someone in crytical state returing whole of the target's HP.
&idesc_energizer: Gives some stamina to the target.
&idesc_small_battery: Gives some HDev energy to the target.
&idesc_coffe: A nice coffe, returns some stamina to the target.
&idesc_peango_pie: A peango pie, stuffed with fruits, returns some of the target's HP and stamina.
&idesc_bread: Some bread, returns some of the target's HP.
&idesc_aged_cheese: A good aged cheese, returns some of the target's HP.
&idesc_decorative_plant: A very nice plant, not sure why I've bought it.
&idesc_aeroboard: This aeroboard was developed by XAGAS® and is the most recent model and one of the most successful ones. Highly reliable with good speed and exceptional handling, not for beginners!
&idesc_gravity_bomb: Hits an enemy with a gravity-based bomb.
&idesc_unknown_supplement: Food supplements, to be used during training, unknown effects.
&idesc_force_supplement: ?s189:Food supplements, to be used during training, improves ''Combat''.
&idesc_defence_supplement: ?s190:Food supplements, to be used during training, improves ''Defence''.
&idesc_magic_supplement: ?s191:Food supplements, to be used during training, improves BioTech effectiveness.
&idesc_magic_defence_supplement: ?s192:Food supplements, to be used during training, improves ''BioTech shielding''.
&idesc_agility_supplement: ?s193:Food supplements, to be used during training, improves ''Agility''.
&idesc_aim_supplement: ?s194:Food supplements, to be used during training, improves ''Aim''.
&idesc_evasion_supplement: ?s195:Food supplements, to be used during training, improves ''Evasion''.
&idesc_stamina_supplement: ?s196:Food supplements, to be used during training, improves max stamina.
&adesc_StrongAttack: A stronger than usual hit. It cause 1/3 more damage, but has -10% chance of hit.
&adesc_Focus: Focus and prepare to receive an attack. Ensures you will dodge and counterattack the next received physical attack. Will deal significant damage.
&adesc_FakeAttack: Perform a feint and an attack, ensuring the attack hits the target.
&adesc_JumpAttack: A very strong jump hit. It causes double damage, but has -10% chance of hit.
&adesc_SonicBoom: Unleashes a powerful sonic wave, striking a foe from afar and dealing heavy damage.
&adesc_ShieldBreaker: A very strong attack capable of penetrating any type of defense. Causes +10% damage and ignores target's defense.
&adesc_Hyperstrike: Causes 7 times more damage than a standard hit. Almost impossible to avoid.
&adesc_AerialCombo: A brutal sequence of 4 aerial attacks that are extremely hard to avoid.
&adesc_FastAttack: An attack that is so quick that has 70% of chances of giving an additional turn. Causes 40% less damage than a standard attack.
&adesc_ValkyriesCry: A powerful shout that affects all the foes. Has 15% of chance of generating confusion.
&adesc_Culling: Two hits. Almost impossible to be avoided.
&adesc_BrutalHit: A very strong hit that will make some enemies fall to the ground and loose a turn. Causes 75% more damage.
&adesc_MortalThrust: A deadly thrust attack. Deals 20% more damage than a standard attack and has a 50% chance to instantly kill the foe.
&adesc_MortalCombo: A combo of 4 hits, deals -20% damage. Has a 10% change of instantly kill the foe. Almost impossible to avoid.
&adesc_Meditation: Increases mental concentration. Will deal 30% more BioTech damage for three turns.
&adesc_HawkMode: Focuses your senses on your aim, increases your chances of hitting foes by 75%.
&adesc_HDevShield: Will nullify the next BioTech or elemental attack, including Protective BioTech. Once the hit is nullified, the shield vanishes.
&adesc_DiplomaticTreaty: Convinces all enemies to flee the battle with a 75% chance of success. It may not work on some enemies.
&adesc_FatalShot: A single shot that deals 3.5 times the damage of a standard shot. Has a 20% chance to instantly kill the foe.
&adesc_BulletShock: A single shot to all the foes that deals 3 times the damage of a standard shot. Has -15% chance of hit.
&adesc_Tank: Catches your breath and prepare to receive hits. Will receive -30% physical damage for the next 4 turns.
&adesc_BulletHell: Instead of shooting a single foe, start shooting all the foes sequentially. The effect will last 3 turns.
&adesc_BulletHellSenso: Instead of shooting a single foe, start shooting all the foes sequentially. The effect will last 3 turns.
&adesc_BigTrick: Throws all the enemies to the ground with 75% chance of success, they'll loose a turn. You'll earn an additional turn.
&adesc_HeavyTank: Focus completely on protection. Will receive -60% physical damage for the next 3 turns.
&adesc_BlindingShot: A single shot that deals 3 times the damage of a standard shot. Has a 100% chance to make the enemy blind for 3 turns. Has -10% chance of hit.
&adesc_MassiveBreakout: Ask your companions to flee the battle instantaneously. You won't be able to escape all the battles.
&adesc_Mania: A combo of 6 hits that will cause -30% of damage each. Very hard to avoid.
&adesc_LethalScissors: Hit a foe with both of your blades at the same time. Causes 4.5 times the damage of a single hit. Hard to avoid.
&adesc_Rage: Loose your temper. You'll deal double damage for 3 turns, but you'll also receive 20% more damage and will have -35% chance of hit.
&adesc_BigFreeze: A powerful attack that will freeze all the enemies in place. They won't be able to move until they get hit.
&adesc_SonicScissors: Use both of your blades to create a sonic wave that can hit your foe from afar. Will cause 6 times more damage than a standard hit.
&adesc_Energy: Restores a fair amount of HP to an ally.
&adesc_Energy+: Restores an high amount of HP to an ally.
&adesc_Blizzard: Generate a sudden drop in temperature that is especially effective against foes that has an high body temperature.
&adesc_Fire: Generate many spheres of fire that will significantly increase the target's temperature. Very effective against endoskeletal creatures.
&adesc_Thunder: Generates a sudden burst of electrons that is particularly effective against foes based on electrical components.
&adesc_Water: Generate a good amount of water that is very effective against foes with silicon-based biology.
&adesc_Dark: Generate a small black hole-like structure that will do a lot of damage due to Hawking radiation.
&adesc_Light: Generate a small light hole-like structure that is particularly effective against foes that are particularly sensitive to photons.
&adesc_Azathoth: Use a large quantity of energy to create a devastating damage to a foe, it is extremely effective against every kind of foe.
&adesc_BlizzardM: Generate many sudden drops in temperature that are especially effective against foes that have an high body temperature. Will hit several targets at once.
&adesc_Blizzard+: Generate a severe drop in temperature that is extremely effective against foes that has an high body temperature.
&adesc_BlizzardM+: Generate many severe drops in temperature that are extremely effective against foes that have an high body temperature. Will hit several targets at once.
&adesc_Confuse: Generate a mental disturbance that is very likely to generate confusion in the opponent. A confused foe tends to hits other foes.
&adesc_DefenseBuff: Creates a light barrier designed to reduce the physical damage an ally may receive.
&adesc_FireM: Generate many sets of spheres of fire that will significantly increase the targets' temperature. Very effective against endoskeletal creatures. Will hit several targets at once.
&adesc_Fire+: Generate a fire ball that will severely damage the opponent. Extremely effective against endoskeletal creatures.
&adesc_FireM+: Generate many fire balls that will severely damage the opponents. Extremely effective against endoskeletal creatures. Will hit several targets at once.
&adesc_FireShield: Will nullify the next heat attack. Once the hit is nullified, the shield vanishes.
&adesc_ForceDebuff: Creates a physical disturbance designed to reduce the damage a foe can deal.
&adesc_FullShield: Will nullify the next BioTech or elemental attack, including Protective BioTech. Once the hit is nullified, the shield vanishes.
&adesc_IceShield: Will nullify the next cold attack. Once the hit is nullified, the shield vanishes.
&adesc_MagicDebuff: Creates a mental disturbance designed to reduce the not-physical damage a foe can deal.
&adesc_Poison: Hits a target with a substance that is very likely to cause damage for a prolonged amount of time.
&adesc_Revive: Will help a defeated ally to return to the battle. Gives a small amount of HP.
&adesc_Revive+: Will help a defeated ally to return to the battle. Gives an higher amount of HP.
&adesc_StasisModule: Generate a bullet that is very likely to freeze an opponent in place. Once the opponent gets an it, it will be able to move again. May not work on some foes.
&adesc_Supernova: Generate a small supernova capable of dealing a great amount of damage to a foe. It is very effective against every kind of foe.
&adesc_ThunderM: Generates many sudden bursts of electrons that are particularly effective against foes based on electrical components. Will hit several targets at once.
&adesc_Thunder+: Generates a severe burst of electrons that is extremely effective against foes based on electrical components.
&adesc_ThunderM+: Generates many severe bursts of electrons that are extremely effective against foes based on electrical components. Will hit several targets at once.
&adesc_ThunderShield: Will nullify the next electric attack. Once the hit is nullified, the shield vanishes.
&adesc_WaterM: Generate multiple entities of water that are ery effective against foes with silicon-based biology. Will hit several targets at once.
&adesc_Water+: Generate a great amount of water and rocks that are extremely effective against foes with silicon-based biology.
&adesc_WaterM+: Generate multiple entities of water and rocks that are extremely effective against foes with silicon-based biology. Will hit several targets at once.
&adesc_WaterShield: Will nullify the next enviromental attack, so based on water/rocks/etc. Once the hit is nullified, the shield vanishes.
&adesc_ChargeTransfer: Transfers up to half of your HDev charge to an ally.
&adesc_AbsorbingShield: Will absorb the damage of the next BioTech or elemental attack. Once the hit is absorbed, the shield vanishes. Protective BioTech will also remove the shield.
&adesc_CureConfusion: Cures the status of confusion of an ally.
&adesc_ReflectiveShield: Create a shield that will reflect the next BioTech or elemental attack, including Protective BioTech. The shield will last 3 turns.
&adesc_Dissipatio: Removes any type of non-physical shield.
&book_tworoostersinonecoop_127:
... despite growing resistance among human colonies, the colonies of Zoi Nangam and Delta Nangam endured harsh punishments and forced labor under Beix rule until 1946. Since 1935, a human general named Fabritius Hammond Rachet, with the support of a dissident Beix commander named Nixibup Almana S'Et Exabaas Madnai, organized a human army consisting of approximately 830,000 individuals spread across 118 settlements. Many of these humans had either served the Beixes as soldiers or were relatives of soldiers, while others were civilians living in subhuman conditions on Beix-colonized planets.

After an eleven-year war, the Beix Empire's reign of terror came to an end on the planet Delta Nangam. With the Beixes' defeat, humans gained control over their most advanced ...
&book_tworoostersinonecoop_128:
... manufacturing technology, including a spaceship later renamed Ternion—composed of three parts—along with some of their scientific knowledge. While most Beix-colonized planets remained under their control, planets with a significant human presence saw the few remaining Beix colonists relocate to other settlements.

In the Nangam System, Delta became a predominantly human planet, while Zoi continued to have a high population of Beixes. Remarkably, coexistence between humans and Beixes on these planets has largely been peaceful, despite the years of prior enslavement, with only a few exceptional cases of conflict. Recruitment for the DTA surged from 1947 onwards, and, as General Rachet firmly believed, began involving solely human beings. The last battle was ...
&book_anthropologyofunits:
According to recent studies, human soldiers have been actively recruited by the DTA for several epochs. Approximately 1871 HLE ago, the first human soldier was enlisted by the Beixes. Thanks to these crucial recruitments, humans are now spread across the vast expanse of the Milky Way.

It’s noteworthy that much of our current technology has its roots in Beix innovations; however, significant advancements have also emerged from the latest recruitments conducted by the DTA on technologically advanced, human-populated planets.

We are now entering an exciting new era of human propagation, raising an intriguing question: Where will this journey take us? Will we reach other galaxies, or will the relentless expansion of the universe create insurmountable barriers to our adventures? Only time will tell. That’s why we must all place our faith in the DTA and invest in scientific and technological research.

I’m speaking directly to you—businessmen and businesswomen!
